name: Chern-Simons Stiffness Pump (anyon statistical rigidity)
verdict_one_line: Statistical-gauge-field stiffness (composite-fermion polarizability) is a glue-free D_s source NOT among the 5 boson families nor H_032-035; honest-null is not pre-satisfied by the freeze and is closed-form ED-testable, though the FQAH host is exotic.
probe_sketch: Doped-FQAH composite-fermion model at level k (theta=pi/k): compute D_s via the Chern-Simons response D_s = (chi_CF * sigma_xy^2)/(1+chi_CF*Pi) from composite-fermion compressibility chi_CF and polarizability Pi(q->0) using flatchern_pair_ed.py + kubo_pair_stiffness.py on a small lattice. Wall-prediction: there is a (filling, k) window where D_s > (2/pi)k_B*164K at fixed n. HONEST-NULL: D_s collapses back onto the Uemura/boson-limited line D_s ~ |U|*nu(1-nu)<g> for ALL k (the CS gauge field renormalizes to zero net stiffness), i.e. composite-fermion polarizability does not survive as physical phase rigidity.

name: Z_N Parafermion Charge-Ne Condensate (high-rigidity multi-charge order)
verdict_one_line: The (Ne)^2 stiffness prefactor is the same donation-vs-density-penalty structure H_032 already settled: the no-go/fractionalization cap eats the gain; charge-Ne also has no ambient-equilibrium host, so it re-confirms the wall.

name: Statistical-Transmutation Fluctuation Trap-Breaker
verdict_one_line: Targets the 'order traps' HALF of the meta-law via defect-braiding statistics (not the glue half) — a lever no card touches (H_032-035 all attack the stiffness/glue side); closed-form SC-vs-trap free-energy crossing is ED-testable and its honest-null is not pre-satisfied.
probe_sketch: Two-channel (SC + CDW/SDW) attractive-extended-Hubbard ED with an added Chern-Simons flux-attachment term at statistical angle theta. Compute F_SC(theta) - F_trap(theta) (free-energy crossing) and the SC phase-ordering T over a theta-sweep. Wall-prediction: a theta-window exists where SC wins (and T_SC > the theta=0 trap-limited ceiling) where it lost at theta=0. HONEST-NULL: flux attachment shifts F_SC and F_trap by EQUAL amounts for all theta (no relative gain) — the braiding statistics renormalizes the SC and trap channels identically, so the trap-limited ceiling is unmoved.

name: Non-Abelian Vortex Entanglement Rigidity (braiding-protected phase coherence)
verdict_one_line: Majorana/non-abelian vortices as a coherence lever fall under the closed-negative topology-as-independent-lever ruling (H_012/H_013); the BKT vortex-pair degeneracy almost certainly contributes zero/entropic free energy — topology bought a gap, never phase rigidity.

name: Bethe-Ceiling Lattice (negative-curvature stiffness ladder)
verdict_one_line: Mermin-Wagner FAILURE on hyperbolic graphs replaces BKT (z=1, log vortex unbinding) with a mean-field crossing at fixed D_s — a connectivity-geometry universality change distinct from H_033's z=2 (dynamics) and directly XY-MC testable; honest-null not pre-satisfied.
probe_sketch: Classical XY model (Cooper-pair phase field) Monte-Carlo on a {7,3} or {5,4} hyperbolic tiling vs a square lattice at IDENTICAL bare stiffness J (the J giving square-lattice T_BKT=134K). Compute T_c(J) on both. Wall-prediction: T_c^hyperbolic / T_c^square >= 1.7 at matched J (vortex entropy can no longer compensate vortex energy on an exponentially-growing graph). HONEST-NULL: T_c^hyperbolic <= 1.2x T_c^square — boundary-dominated finite-size effects / the negative curvature does NOT lift the bulk ordering temperature, BKT-like physics survives at matched D_s.

name: Moire-of-Moire Stiffness Cascade (hierarchical-scale phase rigidity)
verdict_one_line: Still routes coherence through the flat-band D_s the freeze capped; the ln(L2/L1) vortex-core enhancement multiplies the SAME glue-limited D_s in T_BKT~(pi/2)D_s, so it re-confirms the stiffness magnitude wall rather than escaping it.

name: Synthetic-Dimension Coordination Pump (extra hopping axis without extra space)
verdict_one_line: Claims to DECOUPLE flat-band pairing from stiffness-coordination by adding Josephson neighbors in an internal index — a structurally different escape from the 3D count (H_006) and multilayer-D_s; the quantum-metric no-go may or may not bind on a synthetic axis, so the honest-null is genuinely open and ED-testable.
probe_sketch: Attractive-Hubbard BdG on a 2D flat band with an attached N-rung synthetic dimension (internal index, uniform synthetic hopping t_s), real-space flatness held fixed. Compute Kubo D_s(N) via kubo_pair_stiffness.py while monitoring the real-space quantum metric. Wall-prediction: D_s(N) ~ D_s(1)*(1+c(N-1)), c>0, with real-space <g> unchanged, so T_BKT clears 164K for N>=3. HONEST-NULL: D_s is pinned by the single-band minimal-quantum-metric bound regardless of N (synthetic neighbors do not contribute to the PHYSICAL Kubo phase rigidity, only to an internal-index susceptibility) — D_s(N) saturates at D_s(1), reproducing the freeze.

name: Aperiodic / Quasicrystal Vortex Localizer (no Goldstone soft mode to disorder phase)
verdict_one_line: Multifractal vortex pinning + absence of a clean q->0 Goldstone mode attacks the vortex-disordering channel (not D_s) on an aperiodic host — a mechanism the campaign never enumerated; attractive-Hubbard on a Penrose tiling is directly ED/MC-testable and the honest-null is not pre-satisfied.
probe_sketch: Attractive-Hubbard ED/BdG on an Ammann-Beenker or Penrose tiling vs a periodic lattice of EQUAL mean coordination and EQUAL pairing; extract D_s and the vortex-unbinding (BKT) T from twisted-boundary / vortex-fugacity Monte-Carlo. Wall-prediction: T_c^quasicrystal >= 1.2x T_c^periodic at matched D_s, because multifractal critical states raise the vortex-core depinning energy and suppress the soft q->0 phase mode. HONEST-NULL: T_c^quasicrystal <= T_c^periodic at matched D_s (multifractality SUPPRESSES D_s or adds no pinning advantage) — quasiperiodicity reproduces or worsens the wall.

name: ETA-LOCK — single-seed Liouvillian dark-state pump (autonomous eta-pairing NESS)
verdict_one_line: Distance-independent eta-pairing ODLRO is exactly H_034 (the carded one long-shot): eta-pairs are non-thermal fine-tuned eigenstates / dissipative dark states, not an ambient 293K equilibrium bulk SC — H_034 ruled confirm-wall; the single-site-Lindblad framing is the same order, autonomous dissipator instead of pulsed drive.

name: STIFFNESS-FREE TIME CRYSTAL — boundary-time-crystal rigidity as the order-protector
verdict_one_line: Casting the SC order parameter as an oscillating boundary-time-crystal observable has no electron-system host: BTC rigidity is a dynamical limit-cycle of an open spin/cavity ensemble, with no mapping to a charge-2e ambient bulk condensate and no in-silico path from a real screened metal to a collective-dissipation limit cycle.

name: DARK-STATE PAIR PUMP — dissipation-induced topological SC steady state (loss-shaped attractor)
verdict_one_line: A loss-shaped Liouvillian dark-state pair attractor is the same dissipative-engineered-ODLRO class as H_034/ETA-LOCK: the steady-state order is set by gamma/Delta_L (a maintenance power bill), reducing to the BORROW closure the freeze already records — not an ambient-equilibrium escape.

name: Vortex-Code Phase Lock (the superfluid phase as a protected logical variable)
verdict_one_line: A static stabilizer string-tension term raising the vortex CORE ENERGY directly attacks the BKT vortex-unbinding mechanism (the wall's actual loss channel) at fixed D_s — orthogonal to all glue/geometry cards and, unlike measurement-induced O5, carries no continuous Landauer bill; XY-MC testable with honest-null not pre-satisfied.
probe_sketch: Classical XY / lattice-Josephson Monte-Carlo with an added local plaquette-vorticity 'stabilizer' string-tension term S. Compute the renormalized rho_s(T) and T_BKT(S) over an S-sweep at FIXED bare stiffness. Wall-prediction: T_BKT(S) = T_BKT(0)*(1+alpha*S), alpha>0 monotone, so T_BKT rises continuously past the 134-164K-equivalent without more D_s. HONEST-NULL: T_BKT is independent of S (the stabilizer term renormalizes to zero under the phase field's coarse-graining, OR it merely shifts a prefactor without moving the universal-jump unbinding point) — defect-entropy balance is untouched and the wall holds.

name: Infinite-T Memory Graft (subsystem-code symmetry that does not melt)
verdict_one_line: Replaces energetic (stiffness-limited) order with a conserved subsystem-code symmetry charge that has no finite melting T by theorem — an order-class the campaign never enumerated; the crux (does the charge-2e coupling preserve the protecting symmetry?) is itself a clean ED/TN falsifier not pre-satisfied by the freeze.
probe_sketch: Build the explicit Z2xZ2 subsystem-code Hamiltonian augmented with a pair-hopping term tying the logical operator to a charge-2e bilinear; in exact-diagonalization / tensor-network, compute the logical (= order-parameter) autocorrelation C(t) and its T-dependence vs a symmetry-broken control. Wall-prediction: C(t) shows NO Arrhenius decay and NO finite-T cusp up to the lattice cutoff. HONEST-NULL (crux, test first): adding the charge-2e coupling makes the protecting symmetry generator FAIL to commute with H ([S, H] != 0) — the conserved quantity is destroyed by the very coupling that makes it a superconductor, so the order reverts to a finite-T energetic condensate and the wall applies.

name: Zeno-Dragged Condensate (continuous weak measurement that freezes the phase)
verdict_one_line: An externally-powered continuous weak-measurement restoring force on the phase is a non-equilibrium DEVICE (measurement apparatus + feedback power), not an ambient-bulk material lever; its own honest prediction is gain-per-Landauer-joule<=1, re-confirming the O5/BORROW closure — the bulk stays 293K only because an external instrument holds it.

name: DARK-MODE STIFFNESS: subradiant cavity protection of the superfluid phase
verdict_one_line: External-cavity stiffness donation to the Anderson-Bogoliubov phase mode = the BORROW/cavity-QED axis plus a single-channel D_s boost; its honest-null (cavity-renormalized D_s must clear 164K) is the geometric-stiffness wall the freeze already confirmed, and the dark-mode protection is self-admittedly speculative with no static-Hamiltonian host.

name: VACUUM-DRESSED HOPPING: cavity renormalization of the bare bandwidth (photon-assisted flat band)
verdict_one_line: Cavity Lang-Firsov dressing t_eff=t*exp(-(g/Omega)^2) is just an in-situ knob on the SAME flat-band quantum-geometry lever (tr g, CoSn-class) already carded as the FS/flat-band geometric-stiffness wall; flattening the band only re-enters the D_s<=|U|*tr_g ceiling the freeze pinned.

name: POLARITON-BEC PROXIMITY: condensed-photon-fluid phase injection into an adjacent electron layer
verdict_one_line: Requires a fabricated RT-polariton microcavity tunnel-coupled to a 2DEG to physically donate stiffness; the seed's own EI-order-trap falsifier reduces it to the DEAD exciton/EI glue family, and the proximity-transfer claim is a device hand-off, not a closed-form in-silico host.

name: Planckian Pair-Beat (Yukawa-SYK pairing of incoherent electrons)
verdict_one_line: Incoherent (no-quasiparticle) Yukawa-SYK metal: phase stiffness sourced from the FULL incoherent spectral weight rather than a vanishing QP residue Z, with no Migdal/boson-frequency cutoff; this attacks the Emery-Kivelson denominator's hidden quasiparticle assumption, a mechanism NOT among H_032-035 and whose honest-null is a clean self-consistent gap/stiffness comparison the freeze never ran.
probe_sketch: Solve the large-N Yukawa-SYK self-consistent saddle G,Sigma,D,Pi at coupling g and boson scale w0 pinned to a real flat-band DOS N(E_F); extract D_s from the Kubo current-current bubble of the FULL Green's function (not a QP-residue). Probe: D_s(T)/[k_B*164K] vs g and the QP weight Z_inc->0. HONEST-NULL: if the computed Kubo D_s collapses back onto the Uemura/(pi/2)D_s boson-limited line (D_s ~ Z*n/m* saturating <=164K-equiv) for all g, OR T_c re-acquires a w0 boson-energy cap, the SYK incoherence buys nothing and the wall holds.

name: Chaos-Stiffness Inversion (Lyapunov-borrowed phase rigidity)
verdict_one_line: Conjectures the scrambling time t*=hbar/2*pi*k_B*T sets phase rigidity instead of n/m*, but the seed itself admits no paper links scrambling to superfluid stiffness; the twisted-BC stiffness extraction it proposes is exactly the (pi/2)D_s-vs-density test the geometric-stiffness freeze already ran, so its honest-null (stiffness collapses at the n/m* density scale) is pre-satisfied by the wall.

name: Conformal Window Pairing (scale-invariant glue, no boson frequency)
verdict_one_line: The gamma-model critical-glue route is the magnon/spin-fluctuation family taken to its QCP limit (the clean spin-fluctuation lever, already carded); it raises the GAP via a scale-free kernel but says nothing new about D_s, so it re-confirms the same phase-stiffness ceiling that caps the spin-fluctuation route.

name: Holographic Pair Density Wall (semi-local quantum liquid stiffness from a horizon)
verdict_one_line: No material realizes a literal black-hole horizon; only an AdS2-EFT analog is computable and there is no in-silico path from a real screened electronic host to horizon-set scaling dimensions (flagged pure-sf in the pool).

name: Overhauser-Locked Phase Ballast (nuclear-spin co-condensate)
verdict_one_line: A coherent Overhauser/nuclear-spin field as a SECOND phase-rigidity reservoir adding in PARALLEL (rho_s = rho_el + lambda^2*rho_nuc) sourced by nuclear-moment density, not carrier density; this is parallel-channel stiffness donation from a genuinely non-electronic bath (distinct from the multiband H_032 donation which borrows from another ELECTRON band), with a clean isotope-monotonic falsifier the freeze never tested.
probe_sketch: Two-stiffness BKT/XY model: T_BKT = (pi/2)(rho_el + lambda^2*rho_nuc), lambda = A_hf/W (contact-hyperfine over electron bandwidth), rho_nuc = nuclear spin-wave stiffness of a high-moment high-abundance isotope (51V, I=7/2). Probe: T_BKT(A_hf) and isotope contrast Delta-T_BKT(spin-I vs spin-0 even-even isotope) on the SAME lattice. HONEST-NULL: if lambda^2*rho_nuc is parametrically negligible (A_hf/W~1e-3 => lambda^2~1e-6, requiring rho_nuc to exceed rho_el by ~1e6) OR the nuclear spin-wave stiffness itself orders only at neV-ueV (its own T_order << 1K), the parallel ballast contributes nothing and T_BKT collapses to the electronic-only ceiling. Likely confirm-wall, but a clean un-run structurally-orthogonal donation toy.

name: Hyperfine Two-Channel Suhl-Resonance (nuclear-moment Cooper bridge)
verdict_one_line: Anti-adiabatic nuclear pairing channel via a virtual nuclear-spin flip is a two-band Suhl-Matthias amplification on the GAP side (the multiband/interband amplification already carded as H_032 stiffness-donor / Suhl-Kondo class); it raises pairing amplitude, not D_s, and the omega_nuc->0 anti-adiabatic limit with Curie-growth still leaves T_c bounded by the same stiffness wall.

name: Isotopic Knight-Shift Pairing Resonance (hyperfine Feshbach knob)
verdict_one_line: A Feshbach-tuned resonant hyperfine channel injects GAP at a sharply selected energy and explicitly does not raise rho_s (the seed concedes it adds gap 'at fixed rho_s^el'); since the wall is a stiffness ceiling independent of gap, a resonant gap-only knob is pre-satisfied to confirm the wall.

name: Mossbauer-Lattice Recoilless Pair Channel (nuclear-recoil-free glue)
verdict_one_line: No demonstrated mechanism by which a recoilless nuclear isomeric/quadrupole transition mediates electron-electron attraction; the pairing vertex maps to no real host and the channel is flagged pure-sf in the pool (a kernel toy with no material realization).

name: Muonic Hydride Inversion (mu-H3S analog)
verdict_one_line: Explicitly a conventional Migdal-Eliashberg phonon-class glue that attacks the <200meV PHONON omega_log ceiling via mediator-mass tuning in an H3S-class hydride (the seed itself states it does NOT route through spin fluctuations and sidesteps the stiffness wall the way H3S already did) — the hydride/chemical-precompression axis, not the phase-stiffness wall.

name: Bipolaron Effective-Mass Dial (anharmonic ZPM minimum)
verdict_one_line: Real-space bipolaron with rho_s proportional to 1/m* dialed to the Tc(m*) extremum is the bipolaron lever already carded (H_008); the inverse-isotope mass-dial is a re-parametrization of the same anharmonic-bipolaron stiffness mechanism.

name: Positronium-Channel Two-Boson Resonance
verdict_one_line: Requires a positron-rich solid that does not exist; the annihilation width Gamma is the seed's own honest killer (likely forbids net attraction), and virtual-Ps exchange maps to no engineerable host (flagged pure-sf).

name: Mediator-Mass Gradient Lattice (mass-engineered ZPM funnel)
verdict_one_line: Bilayer hydride with a mu-mass-screened sublayer donating omega_log and an H-mass sublayer donating stiffness is a phonon-class anharmonic-Eliashberg hydride construction on the mediator-mass/precompression axis (attacks the <200meV phonon ceiling, not the spin-fluctuation phase-stiffness wall).

name: ZPE Flat-Bander (quantum-nuclear band-flattening via proton delocalization)
verdict_one_line: Isotope-tuned ZPE is just a new actuator for a flat band; the resulting D_s ~ |U|.tr g is the exact geometric-stiffness quantity the freeze measured 20-90x below cuprate scale, so the honest-null (flat band => stiffness-limited) is already proven.

name: Isotopic Quantum-Critical Spacer (18O-tuned paraelectric stiffness donor)
verdict_one_line: Glue-through-spacer is carded (H_009/H_011); the 18O paraelectric soft-mode is a charge-lattice glue-family variant that is dome-ceilinged (~40K, dilute n) per the antiadiabatic-paraelectric analysis, donating mu*-screening not D_s.

name: Mass-Mismatch Anharmonic Cloak (geometry-protecting isotopic anharmonicity against competing order)
verdict_one_line: Even if isotopic ZPE quantum-melts the competing-order trap, the freed condensate still lives on the flat/geometric band whose D_s the freeze already pins below the wall; deleting the trap does not supply stiffness.

name: Vibronic Ratchet Antenna (the FMO-pair host)
verdict_one_line: A 2-site vibronic T-matrix is runnable but the seed's own honest prediction is fatal: a single chromophore wire has zero 3D stiffness and there is no real bulk host; it is at best a pairing-amplitude confirmation toy, not a stiffness escape.

name: Helical Berry-Phase Spinor Wire (the chiral-DNA pairing host)
verdict_one_line: Equal-spin-triplet CISS pairing on a 1D DNA/peptide wire has no real 3D superconducting host and notoriously fragile 1D stiffness (the seed admits it 'needs a bundle'); no in-silico-settleable bulk stiffness exists.

name: Self-Healing Stiffness Bundle (wet 3D phase-lock of soft wires)
verdict_one_line: The escape rests on a non-equilibrium ATP/turnover-driven self-annealing scaffold continuously re-forming inter-wire links - a wet biochemical device, not an in-silico-settleable Hamiltonian; the static-stiffness residue collapses to already-carded multilayer-D_s physics.

name: Proton-Polaron Conveyor (Grotthuss-glued bipolaron wire)
verdict_one_line: A high-energy non-magnetic glue forming a composite bipolaron is the H_008 bipolaron lever; the seed's own honest limit (huge bipolaron mass => tiny stiffness, 'must be paired with a bundle') re-derives the carded bipolaron-mass/stiffness penalty.

name: ENZ Screening Inversion (the Permittivity Mirror)
verdict_one_line: Re[eps]<0 cladding flips the STATIC screened Coulomb sign (no exchanged boson, no competing order) giving a real attraction at metallic n => high D_s; orthogonal to all 5 glue families and the stiffness freeze does not pre-satisfy its null (a cRPA W(q,0) sign test, gated by passivity).
probe_sketch: Probe: embed a 2D electron layer in an effective medium with engineered eps_env(q,w~0); compute the cRPA/constrained static screened interaction W(q,0)=v(q)/eps_tot(q,0) for the embedded layer and scan the eps_env<0 window. ESCAPE if W(q,0)<0 (attractive) over a finite q-band q<q* with q*~2k_F (real scattering phase space) AND the implied pairing at metallic carrier density n gives Kubo D_s above the cuprate 7.4 meV scale. HONEST-NULL (most likely): Kramers-Kronig + passivity (Im eps>=0) force a compensating positive-screening lobe so the integrated W stays >0 for every passive cladding, or the W<0 window collapses to q=0 measure-zero - reproducing the known plasmonic-glue no-go and confirming no static-attraction escape.

name: Hyperbolic Pitch-Black Coulomb (Anisotropic Negative-Group-Velocity Glue Channel)
verdict_one_line: An anisotropic eps-tensor cladding opens an attractive large-q (q~k_F) lobe in the screened kernel - a momentum-SELECTIVE attraction none of the q~0 glue families or flat-band geometry touches; in-silico via cRPA W(q) anisotropy, null not pre-satisfied by the stiffness freeze.
probe_sketch: Probe: for an electron layer on a hyperbolic cladding (eps_par>0, eps_perp<0), compute the momentum-resolved W(q,w~0) via the anisotropic-medium dielectric and compare to an isotropic dielectric of equal mean eps. ESCAPE if W develops an attractive lobe (W<0) at large q ~ k_F that is ABSENT isotropically AND the lobe sits below 2k_F (connects Fermi-surface points), yielding tightly-bound light pairs at metallic n with D_s above the wall. HONEST-NULL: the hyperbolic tensor produces no sign change at any q, OR the attractive lobe lies at q>2k_F (no FS scattering phase space) - so the large-q channel cannot nucleate Fermi-surface pairing and the wall holds.

name: Frequency-Dependent Anti-Screening Notch (Dynamical eps<1 Overshoot)
verdict_one_line: A Reststrahlen-notch mu* suppression acts only on the Coulomb-repulsion side and explicitly 'stacks on top of any glue' - it raises an existing glue's pairing T_c but leaves D_s untouched, so it cannot lift a phase-stiffness wall (which bounds D_s, not mu*).

name: Effective-Medium Vacuum-Permittivity Dressing (Bulk Casimir-Polder Pair Glue)
verdict_one_line: A Lifshitz/macroscopic-QED kernel toy is writable, but the seed itself flags passivity (positive-Im eps) as almost certainly forbidding a net-attractive bulk vacuum tail; there is no host and the most-likely outcome is the known no-go - pure-SF.

name: Antadiabatic Paraelectric Saddle (the un-trapped soft mode)
verdict_one_line: Grounded SrTiO3 paraelectric-QCP glue, but the seed's own prediction is dome-ceilinged below ~40K at dilute n (small D_s); glue and stiffness trade off (doping away from the QCP kills eps), so it confirms the wall in new coordinates.

name: Flexoelectric Gradient Glue (pairing from strain-gradient, not strain)
verdict_one_line: An invented finite-q pairing vertex ~q (vanishing at q=0, the inverse of every surveyed q~0 glue) that can in principle operate at metallic n (large D_s) - orthogonal to the 5 families and to flat-band geometry; BdG-gap-equation testable and its null (Landau-damping of chi_soft at metallic n) is not pre-satisfied by the stiffness freeze.
probe_sketch: Probe: build the flexoelectric pairing kernel V(q,w) = (q*mu)^2 * chi_soft(q,w) (mu = flexocoupling, chi_soft = soft-TO-mode susceptibility) in a 2D BdG/ED toy at METALLIC carrier density and solve the linearized gap equation for the leading eigenvalue lambda and gap symmetry. ESCAPE if lambda>0.3 for physical mu (~nC/m) with a nodeless or extended-s gap on the Fermi surface at a density where Kubo D_s already exceeds the cuprate stiffness scale - then pairing and stiffness are decoupled (glue from chi_soft, D_s from metallic n). HONEST-NULL (likely): at metallic n the soft mode is Landau-damped so chi_soft(q,w->0) collapses exactly where D_s would be large, giving lambda<0.3 / no finite-q instability - the glue dies where the stiffness lives, confirming the wall.

name: Self-Straining Auxetic Pump (lattice that holds its own gradient)
verdict_one_line: No demonstrated auxetic+flexo+SC host exists (the seed is pure-sf at the device level) and its own prediction is self-defeating: a periodic strain-gradient potential flattens bands and lands the condensate right back under the frozen stiffness wall.

name: Internal-Negative-Pressure Cage (chemical tension stuffing)
verdict_one_line: By its own statement it does NOT fight the spin-fluctuation stiffness wall - it routes around it via hydride/covalent phonon pairing at megabar-equivalent density delivered by built-in lattice tension at 1 atm; this is the chemical-precompression PRESSURE axis, a different campaign.

name: Anharmonic Cage Freeze (quartic stabilization recovers the metastable megabar phase at 1 atm)
verdict_one_line: SSCHA rattler-stabilized hydride/covalent cage at 0 GPa — explicitly a phonon condensate that sidesteps the stiffness wall onto the chemical-precompression axis; right campaign, wrong wall.

name: Epitaxial Pressure-Equivalence (biaxial misfit strain == hydrostatic GPa via the bulk modulus)
verdict_one_line: Misfit-strain-as-effective-GPa to recover a high-P el-ph spectrum at 1 atm — its own ceiling is the few-percent coherent-strain limit (~tens of GPa), a pressure/strain magnitude problem, not the Emery-Kivelson stiffness wall.

name: Guest-Charge Doublet (host cage geometry + guest f-electron charge reservoir as a two-job split)
verdict_one_line: Host-guest precompression split in a hydride/B-C clathrate — a covalent/phonon condensate on the chemical-precompression axis; the spin-fluctuation stiffness ceiling does not bind by construction, so it answers a different question.

name: Ligand-Hole Negative-U: the pair lives on oxygen, not the cation
verdict_one_line: BaBiO3-class delocalized-ligand negative-U gives a LIGHT real-space pair (not flat-band quantum-metric, not phonon-H_008, not k-space Leggett-H_032) whose stiffness comes from low m* + high n_pair — honest-null (self-trapping) is not pre-satisfied by the freeze.
probe_sketch: Two-particle Green function of an attractive extended-Hubbard / breathing-bond BaBiO3 lattice (U_eff<0 on the symmetric O6 MO, ligand bandwidth W tuned by M-O-M angle). Compute pair dispersion -> bipolaron m*(W) and rho_s = (hbar^2/4)(n_pair/m*)d, then T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s. CLAIM: m* drops below ~3 m_e as W grows at fixed |U_eff|, decoupling eV binding from stiffness, giving T_BKT>164K. HONEST-NULL (falsifier): m*(W) stays >10 m_e for all W with the pair bound (binding<->delocalization locked: large |U_eff| self-traps the pair, m* ~ exp(+|U_eff|/W)), so rho_s never clears the cuprate 7.4 meV scale and the wall holds — distinct from H_008 (phonon soft-mode bipolaron) which dials a vibrational mediator, not a chemical disproportionation orbital.

name: Frustrated Valence Skipper: the disproportionation that can't crystallize
verdict_one_line: Geometric frustration of negative-U centers forbids the CHARGE-CDW trap, freeing eV on-site pairing — attacks the 'order traps' meta-law in the charge channel (H_022 was spin/frustration), honest-null (charge-glass/VBS instead) not pre-satisfied.
probe_sketch: Extended-Hubbard with U_eff<0 and nearest-neighbor V on a frustrated (pyrochlore/triangular/checkerboard) lattice vs the unfrustrated cubic control, solved by ED/QMC. Track the charge-order gap Delta_CDW and the s-wave pair susceptibility chi_pair vs V/|U_eff|. CLAIM: on the frustrated lattice Delta_CDW->0 (no static checkerboard CDW) while chi_pair stays divergent at a V where the cubic lattice is a CDW insulator, so the eV pairing scale survives un-trapped and the pairing-limited Tc moves above 164K. HONEST-NULL (falsifier): frustration replaces the CDW with a DIFFERENT trap (charge glass / Wigner localization opening a gap, or a valence-bond crystal) that still localizes the pairs, OR chi_pair collapses with Delta_CDW (the same nesting feeds both) — re-confirming that the trap is conserved against the glue.

name: Charge-Kondo / Pair-Resonance Lattice: a negative-U impurity band of preformed pairs
verdict_one_line: Dense valence-skipper lattice -> charge-Kondo pair-resonance band of preformed charge-2e bosons; Tc set by electronic eV-derived hybridization coherence Gamma, not the spin-fluctuation 7.4 meV stiffness — a many-body pair resonance (no quantum-metric ceiling), honest-null not pre-satisfied.
probe_sketch: Lattice Anderson / extended negative-U model (skipper isospin hybridized to a conduction band, p-d coupling V_pd) solved by DMFT or cluster-ED. Extract the two-particle spectral function at E_F: width Gamma and charge-2e weight of the pair-resonance band; estimate T_c ~ Gamma/k_B for BEC of the preformed pairs. CLAIM: Gamma grows with skipper density and V_pd, exceeding ~14 meV (>164K) for strong Tl-O/Bi-O hybridization, with binding>>Gamma so pairs never break (no pseudogap competition). HONEST-NULL (falsifier): the resonance pins to a Kondo-INSULATING gap (no E_F spectral weight -> no condensation), or raising density opens inter-site charge order before Gamma reaches 14 meV — i.e. the same charge-order trap as the frustrated-skipper null reappears.

name: NODAL-SPIN-SPLITTER GLUE (d-wave altermagnet pair vertex)
verdict_one_line: Altermagnet spin splitting is a STATIC spin-group-symmetry band texture, not the soft AFM Goldstone the magnon family (carded) closed on — the pairing root decouples from the Neel stiffness, honest-null (collapses with rho_s = disguised magnon) is the crux and not pre-satisfied.
probe_sketch: 2-band altermagnet Hubbard/RPA at half-filling: build the spin-fluctuation pairing kernel on the d-wave-split Fermi surface and extract the leading attractive eigenvalue lambda_pair, then sweep the Neel-vector stiffness rho_s (soften the AFM order) at FIXED anisotropic inter-sublattice hopping. CLAIM: lambda_pair stays finite (>0.3) as rho_s->0 because the splitting is set by the crystal-field/hopping term, not by <S>, so pairing strength and magnetic phase stiffness are separated roots (unlike the Emery-Kivelson cuprate where J and rho_s share one root). HONEST-NULL (falsifier): lambda_pair tracks rho_s and collapses as the order softens -> the vertex is just a disguised magnon and re-confirms the carded magnon-family closure.

name: ZERO-MOMENT STIFFNESS LADDER (decoupled magnetic-vs-charge phase stiffness)
verdict_one_line: Metallic compensated altermagnet (n~10^22/cm^3) supplies high CHARGE superfluid stiffness while magnetic compensation is a lattice-symmetry property, not carrier starvation — directly attacks the wall's under-weighted root (cuprate low-D_s is doped-Mott scarcity), an untested host category.
probe_sketch: Kubo superfluid-weight D_s for a RuO2-class metallic-altermagnet tight-binding model at carrier density n~10^22 cm^-3, given a pairing gap from the NODAL-SPIN-SPLITTER vertex; compare D_s^eff to the cuprate 7.4 meV (=134K) scale, then T_BKT=(pi/2)D_s^eff. CLAIM: because n is ~10-100x the underdoped-cuprate density and compensation is symmetry-enforced (not Mott-doping), D_s^eff>7.4 meV and T_BKT clears 164K. HONEST-NULL (falsifier): every altermagnet with usable spin splitting turns out to be a LOW-carrier insulator/semimetal (MnTe-class), forcing D_s^eff back below the cuprate wall, OR the high-n metal (RuO2-class) has too weak a pairing vertex to gap the Fermi surface — the carrier-density and pairing-strength knobs are anti-correlated, reproducing the wall.

verdict_one_line: Spin-group-symmetry-locked altermagnet vertex degrades with moment amplitude much slower than a Goldstone-magnon vertex — a structurally new escape from the 'order traps' law (glue carried by anisotropy/symmetry, partially decoupled from order amplitude); honest-null (tracks <S>^2 like AFM) is the clean falsifier.
probe_sketch: Finite-T classical-MC+RPA (or DMFT/QMC) of an altermagnet Hubbard model: extract lambda_pair(T) and compare against an AFM-magnon control vertex on the same lattice, both normalized to their T=0 value. CLAIM: lambda_pair(T) retains >50% at T~0.7 T_N (short-range altermagnetic correlations preserve the spin-group symmetry as <S> shrinks) while the AFM control falls below 50% by T~0.3 T_N, so the glue survives the temperature range where the carded magnon family thermally self-destructs. HONEST-NULL (falsifier): lambda_pair(T) tracks <S>^2 identically to the AFM control -> symmetry protection gives zero thermal robustness and the order-trap closes at the same T as the magnon family.

probe_sketch: Attractive-Hubbard BdG on an L x L lattice with on-site disorder W drawn from [-W/2,W/2], sweep W to enter the disorder-induced-flat-band regime (DOS spike at E_F, IPR rising). Compute the Kubo geometric stiffness D_s(W) = (e^2/hbar^2) * [<-k_x> - Pi_xx(q->0,omega=0)] disorder-averaged over >=50 samples, and T_BKT = (pi/2) D_s(W). HONEST-NULL (confirm-wall): D_s(W) is non-monotone and its maximum stays >=20x below the cuprate 7.4 meV phase-stiffness scale (i.e. T_BKT_max << 134 K), OR disorder that flattens the band simultaneously localizes the pairs (xi_loc < lattice spacing) so the superfluid response vanishes (D_s -> 0 as IPR -> 1). ESCAPE only if a finite W* gives D_s(W*) with T_BKT > 134 K AND xi_loc > vortex-core size (pairs stay extended). Tooling: flatband_pair_ed.py + kubo_pair_stiffness.py with an added random on-site term.
